paired_card.line: From studio to screen. Nothing lost.

copy: One tree above the lake, the sunset returned whole in the water. From studio to screen – nothing lost.
alt: A lone tree stands on a rock above a spectacular view of the lake and surrounding mountains. The colours of the sunset reflect in the water, creating a picturesque scene.
alt_product: moodcase gallery view showing the lone-tree lake-sunset shot carried from studio to screen.
